decision: Adopt AIOS Operating System (control plane) on top of existing engine
options_considered: Build new system from scratch; extend existing engine; do nothing
reasoning: Existing engine is mature; one-brain/no-rebuild canon says patch the missing operating layer

decision: Operate Unit Finder URL→unit as 'likely + confirm' until bridge dataset exists
options_considered: Treat URL matches as exact; block URL feature entirely; likely+confirm
reasoning: No local URL→unit bridge; honest confidence avoids wrong client/contract data

decision: Make hosted backend fail-closed (API 401 without auth) instead of fail-open
options_considered: Keep fail-open + rely on setting env vars; fail-closed by default
reasoning: Default-open deploy exposed PII lookups + WhatsApp relay; setting vars is forgettable; fail-closed removes the foot-gun at the root
expected_outcome: No accidental public exposure on deploy

decision: Freeze Unit Finder as brain backlog and return active execution to website functional completion
options_considered: Continue Unit Finder/Bayut work; partially optimize resolver; freeze and return to construction roadmap
reasoning: Current bridge/data acquisition and public listing resolution are insufficient for V1 certification; more activity here would not create product-ready progress
expected_outcome: Website-first execution with no further Unit Finder engineering until website/WhatsApp/app/current priorities are complete
